texto: Spoken words are like seeds that we plant which will eventually grow into something sweet or bitter. Our actions in this life are seeds we're planning for the other life promised by Allah.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Shems Friedlander: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Spoken words are like seeds that we plant which will eventually grow into something sweet or bitt…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, inspiring, seeds pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e reflexao.
